event: First recorded Olympic Games in Ancient Greece
Ancient Olympic Games are abolished by Emperor Theodosius I
Golf is banned by King James II of Scotland
Calcio Fiorentino, an early form of football, is codified in Florence
Cotswold Olimpick Games begin in England
First codified rules of boxing (Broughton's rules) are introduced
First official cricket match at Hambledon
William Webb Ellis purportedly invents rugby
First Oxford and Cambridge Boat Race
Grand National steeplechase is first run at Aintree
Knickerbocker rules for baseball are written
Cambridge rules for association football are drawn up
The America's Cup sailing race begins
Sheffield F.C., the world's oldest independent football club, is founded
First Open Championship in golf is held at Prestwick
The Football Association is formed in London
The Queensberry Rules for boxing are published
First recorded bicycle race at Parc de Saint-Cloud, Paris
Cincinnati Red Stockings become the first fully professional baseball team
The FA Cup tournament is inaugurated
First official international football match (Scotland vs England)
The Scottish Football Association is founded
The first Kentucky Derby is run
The National League of Professional Baseball Clubs is formed
First Wimbledon tennis championship is held
The Ashes cricket series between England and Australia originates
First Home Nations rugby championship
James Naismith invents basketball
First professional American football game is played
The Stanley Cup is first awarded for ice hockey
International Olympic Committee is founded
William G. Morgan invents volleyball
First modern Olympic Games are held in Athens
The first Boston Marathon is run
Women compete in the Olympics for the first time
The American League of Professional Baseball Clubs is founded
First Tour de France bicycle race takes place
FIFA (Fédération Internationale de Football Association) is founded
First Australian Open tennis tournament
First Grand Prix motor race is held in France
Figure skating becomes the first winter sport contested at the Olympics
The first Giro d'Italia cycling race
First Indianapolis 500 automobile race
IAAF (World Athletics) is founded
The PGA of America is founded
National Hockey League (NHL) is formed
The American Professional Football Association (later NFL) is founded
First water skiing performed by Ralph Samuelson
The first 24 Hours of Le Mans endurance race
First Winter Olympics in Chamonix, France
First Ryder Cup golf tournament is held
First FIFA World Cup is held in Uruguay
First baseball players to wear numbers on their backs regularly
First Masters Golf Tournament is played at Augusta National
Jesse Owens wins four gold medals at the Berlin Olympics
The National Baseball Hall of Fame opens
The Basketball Association of America (later NBA) is founded
Jackie Robinson breaks the baseball color line
The first Paralympic Games (Stoke Mandeville Games) take place
First Formula One World Championship race
Roger Bannister breaks the four-minute mile
First UEFA European Cup is held
The first official Paralympic Games are held in Rome
England wins the FIFA World Cup
First Super Bowl is played
Tommie Smith and John Carlos perform the Black Power salute at the Olympics
Brazil wins their third World Cup with Pelé
Title IX is passed in the USA, expanding women's sports
Billie Jean King wins the 'Battle of the Sexes' tennis match
The Rumble in the Jungle boxing match
Nadia Comăneci scores the first perfect 10 in Olympic gymnastics
The 'Miracle on Ice' at the Lake Placid Winter Olympics
Joan Benoit wins the first Olympic women's marathon
Diego Maradona scores the 'Hand of God' goal
Florence Griffith-Joyner sets the women's 100m world record
Buster Douglas knocks out Mike Tyson
The first FIFA Women's World Cup is held
The US 'Dream Team' competes at the Barcelona Olympics
Ayrton Senna dies at the San Marino Grand Prix
South Africa wins the Rugby World Cup, uniting the nation
MLS (Major League Soccer) plays its inaugural season
Tiger Woods wins his first Masters at age 21
France wins the FIFA World Cup on home soil
Brandi Chastain secures the US Women's World Cup victory
The XFL debuts its first season
First FIFA World Cup co-hosted by two nations (Japan/South Korea)
Boston Red Sox win the World Series, breaking the Curse of the Bambino
Usain Bolt sets 100m and 200m world records at the Beijing Olympics
Michael Phelps becomes the most decorated Olympian of all time
Leicester City remarkably wins the English Premier League
